top_signals.title: J-ENG to exhibit at Posidonia 2026
top_signals.summary: Japan Engine Corporation (J-ENG) will exhibit at “Posidonia 2026”, an international maritime exhibition held in Athens, Greece, from June 1st to June 5th, 2026. top_signals.summary: Asyad Shipping has officially launched its new Very Large Crude Carrier “Bidbid”, marking the first of four new giant oil tankers set to join the company’s expanding fleet.
